creator: pauamma@gundo.com
text: In "1.9. What is the FreeBSD-STABLE concept?" > "Version 12.1 is the latest release from the 13-STABLE branch; it was released in November 4, 2019. Version 11.3 is the latest release from the 12-STABLE branch; it was released in July 9, 2019.", 12.1 should be 13.0, 11.3 should be 12.3, and the release months should be corrected to match https://www.freebsd.org/security/#sup.
